report.summary: Stable cycle: no new commits since 21aaf5b. 569 published slugs, 464 with page.tsx (105 legacy backlog). 142 TS errors unchanged across 5 files (non-blocking). All 6 API routes present with healthy cache TTLs. No regressions detected.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 569 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES — 464 have matching page.tsx files, 105 missing (legacy backlog, unchanged from prior cycle)
142 TypeScript errors across 5 files — all pre-existing: lido-v3-stvaults (94), structured-data.examples (15), crypto-arbitrage (4), institutional-adoption (2), crypto-index-funds (2)
Error types: unescaped JSX characters (> in text), missing closing tags ($1B), comma-expected in template literals — all JSX content issues, not logic bugs
Build uses ignoreBuildErrors: true — TS errors do not block Vercel deploys
No new regressions introduced this cycle
Live site HTTP verification unavailable (egress proxy blocked)

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6 public API routes verified present: prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields
Cache TTLs healthy: prices (60s/swr30s), trending (300s/swr60s), fear-greed (600s/swr1200s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s/swr60s), defi-yields (60s edge)
defi-yields has circuit breaker pattern (5-fail threshold, 1min reset) + retries with exponential backoff
Health endpoint (/api/health) present with rate limiting (100 req/min)
ONGOING: 0/6 public data API routes integrate the rate-limiter module — only /api/health uses it
No code changes to API routes this cycle — stable

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest commit: 21aaf5b (batch deploy: 170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, OG images, UX fixes)
No new commits today — deployment is stable on last known build
Vercel CLI remote check unavailable in sandbox — no error spikes detectable locally
Build config uses NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=8192' and ignoreBuildErrors: true — production-safe
No manual triggers or rollbacks needed

sections.title: Project Manager
items: No new code shipped this cycle — quiet period between sprints
105 published slugs still missing page.tsx (wallets: 20, investing/best: 13, taxes: 15, learn: 28, blog: 9, misc: 20) — content backlog for scaffolding
TS error cleanup remains carry-over: 5 files with JSX content issues need fixing before ignoreBuildErrors can be removed
Rate limiter integration across public API routes remains carry-over from prior cycles
No blockers requiring Jefe's attention — system stable
